summary: Stage 33.1 Testing Complete - Fixed booking availability logic bug, verified all dashboard pages (admin, partner, renter), currency selector, and RLS v2 SQL script. 9/9 backend tests passed.

passed_tests.result: PASS - Categories, search, currency selector all visible
PASS - All 6 currencies (THB, USD, RUB, CNY, EUR, GBP) available with flags
PASS - Booking created with guest info, price calculation, commission
PASS - Filter by listingId, partnerId, renterId working
PASS - Users, listings, bookings, revenue stats returned
PASS - Partner listings, bookings, balance returned
PASS - Full sidebar, stats cards, charts, Telegram Command Center visible
PASS - Stats cards, quick actions, Add Listing button visible
PASS - My Dashboard with stats, Recent Bookings, quick actions visible

passed_tests.test: Admin Role Bar shows for admin users
passed_tests.result: PASS - Green top bar with 'Admin Panel' button and user info

action_items: Apply RLS v2 SQL script in Supabase SQL Editor to fix TEXT ID casting issues
critical_code_review_comments: AdminHeaderBar component uses Supabase auth for role check (secure) while RoleBar uses localStorage (faster UX)
Dashboard router redirects based on Supabase auth role, not localStorage
updated_files: /app/lib/services/booking.service.js - Fixed availability check logic and guest ID handling
context_for_next_testing_agent: Stage 33.1 fully verified. Booking API now works with null renter_id for guest bookings. Fixed availability check logic (was using OR instead of AND for date overlap). Dashboard routes: /admin for admins, /dashboard/partner for partners, /dashboard/renter for renters. Currency selector saves to localStorage with key 'funnyrent_currency'. RLS v2 script at /app/database/rls_policies_v2.sql needs manual application in Supabase SQL Editor.

bug_fixes_applied.issue: Availability check using wrong logic - OR condition matching all bookings
bug_fixes_applied.reason: Correct overlap detection requires both conditions to be true (AND), not either (OR)

bug_fixes_applied.issue: Guest ID fallback violating foreign key constraint
bug_fixes_applied.fix: Changed `guest-${Date.now()}-...` fallback to `null` for anonymous bookings
bug_fixes_applied.reason: renter_id has FK to profiles.id, so generated guest IDs fail. null is allowed for guest bookings.
